meta.siteTitle: Ponte. The bridge between buyer and seller.
meta.siteDescription: The free, vetted marketplace for physical trade. Post what you sell or what you need. AI and the desk verify every listing. Connect directly, anonymous until both sides agree, at no cost. The Ponte desk manages deals end to end only on request, on a success fee or retainer. Operated by 1402 Celsius Ltd.
meta.ogDescription: Every listing vetted. Every connection free. Post an offer or a requirement in three steps, and bring in the desk only when you want the deal managed.
meta.twitterDescription: The free, vetted marketplace for physical trade. Desk-managed deals optional, on success fee or retainer.
